title: deer-flow.forge.session.council_linked v1
description: A council deliberation was linked to a Forge session. Fires when PATCH /sessions/{id} sets council_deliberation_id OR when apply_council_verdict_to_session mirrors a verdict onto session.art. Producer: backend/packages/harness/deerflow/bus.py::emit_forge_session_council_linked. Subject is session_id. council_deliberation_id is truncated to 200 chars; verdict_score is rounded to 4 decimals or null.

council_deliberation_id.description: stable id of the linked council deliberation, or null if unset/cleared

verdict_score.description: council verdict score rounded to 4 decimals, or null when no verdict yet

passes_threshold.description: whether the verdict_score meets the session's configured ship threshold
